title: pleiotaxis selina
intro: Pleiotaxis selina, also known as the Selina daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Pleiotaxis selina include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential therapeutic applications. The health benefits associated with the plant are its ability to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Pleiotaxis selina typically involve its leaves and flowers being dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a decoction, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
